title: Sheet Pan Chicken Kebab Wraps

ingredients.note: garlic sauce · a splash, to loosen
ingredients.note_su: saus bawang putih · sak ciprat, kanggo ngencerno

steps.text: Make the kebab mix: combine the ground chicken with the diced onion, diced red pepper, minced garlic, chopped coriander, paprika, cumin, salt, pepper, chilli powder, turmeric and olive oil. Mix until well combined.
steps.text_su: Gawe adonan kebab: campur daging pitik giling ambek bawang bombay sing diiris, paprika abang sing diiris, bawang putih sing dicacah, daun ketumbar, bubuk paprika, jinten, uyah, mrico, bubuk cabe, kunir, ambek lengo zaitun. Aduk ngasi rata.

steps.text: Shape into kebabs and lay them out on a lined sheet pan.
steps.text_su: Bentuk dadi kebab, tata nang loyang sing wis dialasi.

steps.text: Bake at 190°C for 20–25 minutes, draining the juices at the halfway point, until cooked through and golden.
steps.text_su: Panggang nang oven 190°C suwene 20–25 menit, buang banyune pas setengah dalan, ngasi mateng lan kuning keemasan.

steps.text: Make the garlic sauce: whisk together the Greek yoghurt, light mayo, garlic powder, dried dill, salt, pepper and lemon juice, loosening with a splash of water to your desired consistency.
steps.text_su: Gawe saus bawang putih: kocok yogurt Yunani, mayo light, bubuk bawang putih, dill garing, uyah, mrico, ambek banyu jeruk lemon; encerno nganggo sak ciprat banyu miturut kekentelan sing dikarepno.

steps.text: Make the salad: toss the finely diced red onion, cherry tomatoes and cucumber with a sprinkle of coriander, and season with salt to taste.
steps.text_su: Gawe salad: campur bawang abang sing diiris alus, tomat ceri, ambek timun karo taburan daun ketumbar; bumboni uyah miturut selera.

steps.text: Assemble: spread garlic sauce over each Lebanese wrap, add the kebabs and salad, and roll up. Makes 4 wraps — about 586 cal and 62g protein each.
steps.text_su: Rakit: olesi saben roti wrap nganggo saus bawang putih, lebokno kebab ambek salad, terus gulung. Dadi 4 wrap — kiro-kiro 586 kalori ambek 62g protein saben siji.

notes: Full recipe from the creator's caption. Makes 4 wraps at ~586 cal / 62g protein each. Meal prep: store the kebabs, salad and sauce in separate containers (wrap the kebabs in foil) in the fridge for up to 5 days; reheat the kebabs in an air-fryer or pan, then assemble.
notes_su: Resep lengkap teko caption sing nggawe. Dadi 4 wrap, ~586 kalori / 62g protein saben siji. Meal prep: simpen kebab, salad, ambek saus kapisah (kebab dibungkus foil) nang kulkas ngasi 5 dino; anget-angeti kebab nang air fryer utowo kuali, terus rakit.
